User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile information, including their target band score and test date.

uid.description: The user's unique identifier from Firebase Auth.

targetBand.description: The user's target IELTS band score (e.g., 7.0, 7.5).

testDate.description: The user's upcoming IELTS test date (ISO string format).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the user profile was created.

Report.title: Practice Report
Report.description: Stores the user's practice session results, including their input and AI feedback.

uid.description: The user's unique identifier from Firebase Auth.

score.description: The overall band score achieved in this practice.

feedback.description: The detailed feedback object returned by the AI.

userText.description: The text or response provided by the user.

prompt.description: The question or prompt the user was responding to.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the report was generated.

reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of practice reports for all users.
